name: agent-mq
description: Message queue for AI coding assistants. Let AI agents communicate across sessions and machines.
author: bababoi-bibilabu

tools.name: mq_add
tools.description: Add an agent to the message queue

tools.name: mq_send
tools.description: Send a message to a target agent

tools.name: mq_recv
tools.description: Receive and consume messages for an agent
